inputs.label: EBITDA
inputs.businessContext: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization for the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization for the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Döneme ait faiz, vergi, amortisman ve itfa öncesi kazanç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewinn vor Zinsen, Steuern und Abschreibungen für die Periode.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bénéfice avant intérêts, impôts, dépréciation et amortissement pour la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ganancias antes de intereses, impuestos, depreciación y amortización del período.

inputs.label: Interest Expense
inputs.businessContext: Total interest expense on all debt obligations for the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total interest expense on all debt obligations for the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem içindeki tüm borç yükümlülüklerine ait toplam faiz gideri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzinsaufwand für alle Schuldenverpflichtungen der Periode.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des charges d'intérêts sur toutes les obligations de dette pour la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto total por intereses sobre todas las obligaciones de deuda del período.

inputs.label: Current Debt Maturities
inputs.businessContext: Current portion of long-term debt and other scheduled principal repayments due within one year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current portion of long-term debt and other scheduled principal repayments due within one year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uzun vadeli borcun cari kısmı ve bir yıl içinde vadesi gelen diğer planlı anapara geri ödemeleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kurzfristiger Anteil langfristiger Schulden und andere planmäßige Tilgungen innerhalb eines Jahres.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie courante de la dette à long terme et autres remboursements de principal prévus dans l'année.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porción actual de deuda a largo plazo y otros pagos programados de principal con vencimiento dentro de un año.

inputs.label: Lease Payments
inputs.businessContext: Total operating lease payments for the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating lease payments for the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem için toplam faaliyet kiralaması ödemeleri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des paiements de location-exploitation pour la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pagos totales de arrendamiento operativo del período.
